restarter.server_unhealthy_kick_reason: the server needs to be restarted, please reconnect
restarter.partial_hang_warn: Due to a partial hang, this server will restart in 1 minute. Please disconnect now.
restarter.partial_hang_warn_discord: Due to a partial hang, **%{servername}** will restart in 1 minute.
restarter.schedule_warn: This server is scheduled to restart in %{smart_count} minute. Please disconnect now. |||| This server is scheduled to restart in %{smart_count} minutes.
restarter.schedule_warn_discord: **%{servername}** is scheduled to restart in %{smart_count} minute. |||| **%{servername}** is scheduled to restart in %{smart_count} minutes.

ban_messages.kick_temporary: (%{author}) You have been banned from this server for "%{reason}". Your ban will expire in: %{expiration}.
ban_messages.kick_permanent: (%{author}) You have been permanently banned from this server for "%{reason}".

reject.title_permanent: You have been permanently banned from this server.
reject.title_temporary: You have been temporarily banned from this server.
reject.note_multiple_bans: Note: you have more than one active ban on your identifiers.
reject.note_diff_license: Note: the ban above was applied for another license, which means some of your IDs/HWIDs match the ones associated with that ban.

admin_only.insufficient_ids: You do not have discord or fivem identifiers, and at least one of them is required to validate if you are a fxPanel administrator.
admin_only.deny_message: Your identifiers are not assigned to any fxPanel administrator.

guild_member.mode_title: This server is in Discord server Member Whitelist mode.
guild_member.insufficient_ids: You do not have the discord identifier, which is required to validate if you have joined our Discord server. Please open the Discord Desktop app and try again (the Web app won't work).
guild_member.deny_title: You are required to join our Discord server to connect.
guild_member.deny_message: Please join the guild %{guildname} then try again.

guild_roles.mode_title: This server is in Discord Role Whitelist mode.
guild_roles.insufficient_ids: You do not have the discord identifier, which is required to validate if you have joined our Discord server. Please open the Discord Desktop app and try again (the Web app won't work).
guild_roles.deny_notmember_title: You are required to join our Discord server to connect.
guild_roles.deny_notmember_message: Please join %{guildname}, get one of the required roles, then try again.
guild_roles.deny_noroles_title: You do not have a whitelisted role required to join.
guild_roles.deny_noroles_message: To join this server you are required to have at least one of the whitelisted roles on the guild %{guildname}.

approved_license.mode_title: This server is in License Whitelist mode.
approved_license.insufficient_ids: You do not have the license identifier, which means the server has sv_lan enabled. If you are the server owner, you can disable it in the server.cfg file.
approved_license.deny_title: You are not whitelisted to join this server.

nui_warning.title: WARNING
nui_warning.stale_message: This warning was issued before you connected to the server.
nui_warning.instruction: Hold %{key} for %{smart_count} second to dismiss this message. |||| Hold %{key} for %{smart_count} seconds to dismiss this message.

misc.help_message:
fxPanel Menu enabled, type /tx to open it.
You can also configure a keybind at [Game Settings > Key Bindings > FiveM > Menu: Open Main Page].
misc.menu_not_admin:
Your identifiers do not match any admin registered on fxPanel.
If you are registered on fxPanel, go to Admin Manager and make sure your identifiers are saved.
misc.menu_auth_failed: fxPanel Menu authentication failed with reason: %{reason}
misc.no_perms: You do not have this permission.
misc.no_perms_action: You do not have permission to %{action} players.
misc.not_enabled: The fxPanel Menu is not enabled! You can enable it in the fxPanel settings page.
misc.dialog_empty_input: You cannot have an empty input.
misc.onesync_error: This option requires OneSync to be enabled.
misc.redm_not_available: This option is not yet available for RedM.

frozen.was_frozen: You have been frozen by a server admin!

tooltips.tooltip_1: Use %{key} to switch pages & the arrow keys to navigate menu items
tooltips.tooltip_2: Certain menu items have sub options which can be selected using the left & right arrow keys

noclip.title: NoClip
noclip.label: Toggle NoClip, allowing you to move through walls and other objects

godmode.title: God
godmode.label: Toggle invincibility, preventing you from taking damage

superjump.title: Super Jump
superjump.label: Toggle super jump mode, the player will also run faster

normal.title: Normal
normal.label: Returns yourself back to the default/normal player mode

waypoint.title: Waypoint
waypoint.label: Teleport to the custom waypoint set on the map

coords.title: Coords
coords.label: Teleport to the provided coordinates
coords.dialog_desc: Provide coordinates in an x, y, z format to go through the wormhole.
coords.dialog_error: Invalid coordinates. Must be in the format of: 111, 222, 33

back.title: Back
back.label: Returns to the location prior to last teleport
back.error: You don't have a last location to go back to!

copy.title: Copy Coords
copy.label: Copy the current world coordinates to your clipboard

goto.invalid_id: Invalid player ID. Must be a number.

vehicle.title: Vehicle
vehicle.not_in_veh_error: You are not currently in a vehicle!

spawn.title: Spawn
spawn.label: Spawn a given vehicle from its model name
spawn.dialog_desc: Enter in the model name of the vehicle you want to spawn.
spawn.dialog_error: The vehicle model name '%{modelName}' does not exist!
spawn.load_failed: Failed to spawn vehicle: model '%{modelName}' did not load in time.

fix.title: Fix
fix.label: Will repair the vehicle to its maximum health

delete.title: Delete
delete.label: Deletes the vehicle the player is currently in

boost.title: Boost
boost.label: Boost the car to achieve max fun (and maybe speed)
boost.unsupported_class: This vehicle class is not supported.
boost.redm_not_mounted: You can only boost when mounted on a horse.

myself.title: Myself
myself.label: Will heal yourself to the current ped's maximum
myself.success_1: You should be feeling good now!

everyone.title: Everyone
everyone.label: Will heal & revive all connected players

radius.title: Radius
radius.label: Will heal & revive players within a radius
radius.dialog_desc: Enter the radius (in units) to heal nearby players
radius.dialog_error: Invalid radius. Must be between 1 and 500.
radius.success: Healed players within the specified radius.

announcement.title: Send Announcement
announcement.label: Send an announcement to all online players.
announcement.dialog_desc: Enter the message you want to broadcast to all players.

clear_area.title: Reset World Area
clear_area.label: Reset a specified world area to its default state
clear_area.dialog_desc: Please enter the radius where you wish to reset entities in (0-300). This will not clear entities spawned server side.

player_ids.title: Toggle Player IDs
player_ids.label: Toggle showing player IDs (and other info) above the head of all nearby players

misc.error: An error occurred fetching this users details. The error is shown below:
misc.target_not_found: Was unable to find an online player with ID or a username of %{target}

dm_dialog.title: Direct Message
dm_dialog.description: What is the reason for direct messaging this player?

warn_dialog.title: Warn
warn_dialog.description: What is the reason for direct warning this player?

kick_dialog.title: Kick
kick_dialog.description: What is the reason for kicking this player?

defaults.configurable_embed_description: You can configure this embed in `fxPanel > Settings > Discord Bot`.

errors.invalid_url_details:
Every URL must start with one of (`http://`, `https://`, `discord://`).
URLs cannot be empty, if you do not want a URL then remove the URL line.
errors.invalid_placeholder_details:
Your URL starts with `{{`, try removing it.
If you just tried to edit a placeholder like `{{serverBrowserUrl}}` or `{{serverJoinUrl}}`, remember that those placeholders are replaced automatically by fxPanel, meaning you do not need to edit them at all.
errors.invalid_emoji_details:
All emojis must be one of:
- UTF-8 emoji ('😄')
- Valid emoji ID ('1062339910654246964')
- Discord custom emoji (`<:name:id>` or `<a:name:id>`).
To get the full emoji code, insert it into discord, and add `\` before it then send the message
errors.invalid_status_color: Invalid status color `%{value}`. Use a hex value like `#0BA70B`.
errors.footer_object: Embed footer must be an object.
errors.footer_text: Embed footer text must be a non-empty string.
errors.author_object: Embed author must be an object.
errors.author_name: Embed author name must be a non-empty string.
errors.fields_array: Embed fields must be an array.
errors.field_name: Embed field name must be a non-empty string.
errors.field_value: Embed field value must be a non-empty string.
errors.field_inline: Embed field inline must be a boolean.
errors.embed_object: Embed JSON must resolve to an object.
errors.title_string: Embed title must be a string.
errors.description_string: Embed description must be a string.
errors.invalid_button_config:
Invalid button in Discord Status Embed Config.
All buttons must have:
- Label: string, not empty
- URL: string, not empty, valid URL
errors.button_label_empty: Button label must resolve to a non-empty string.
